metadata.description: Automatically detected recurring question templates and structures

patterns.name: Unit Conversion Speed
patterns.template: Distance in meters, time in minutes, find speed in km/hr
patterns.shortcut: Multiply distance in meters by 3/25 and divide by time in minutes

patterns.name: Bus Stoppage Time
patterns.template: Given speed with and without stoppages, find stoppage time per hour
patterns.shortcut: Time lost = time to cover (S1-S2) km at S1 km/hr

patterns.name: Average Speed Equal Distances
patterns.template: Two equal distances covered at different speeds, find average speed
patterns.shortcut: Harmonic mean of two speeds for equal distances

patterns.name: Train Crossing Platform
patterns.template: Train length given, time to cross pole, find time to cross platform
patterns.shortcut: Speed from pole crossing, then apply to total distance

patterns.name: Time-Work Two Workers
patterns.template: A can complete in X days, B in Y days, together in ?

patterns.name: Find Third Worker Rate
patterns.template: A and B take known time, with C they take less time, find C alone
patterns.shortcut: C's rate = Combined rate - A's rate - B's rate

patterns.name: Efficiency Ratio Workers
patterns.template: A is N times as fast as B, find combined time
patterns.formula: If A is n times as fast, A's rate = n x B's rate
patterns.shortcut: A's time = B's time / n, then use combined formula

patterns.name: HCF by Euclidean Algorithm
patterns.template: Find HCF of two numbers using division method
patterns.shortcut: Divide larger by smaller, repeat with remainder

patterns.name: HCF-LCM Product Rule
patterns.template: Given HCF, LCM, one number, find other number
patterns.shortcut: Other number = (HCF x LCM) / Given number

patterns.name: Successive Percentage Change
patterns.template: Population/Price changes by x%, then y%, then z%, find net effect
patterns.shortcut: Multiply all multipliers, never add/subtract percentages directly

patterns.name: Percentage Base Error
patterns.template: A is x% more than B, B is what % less than A?
patterns.formula: If A = B(1+x/100), then B is [x/(100+x)]x100% less than A
patterns.shortcut: Answer is always LESS than x%

patterns.name: Profit Triples When SP Doubled
patterns.template: If selling price doubled, profit triples, find profit%

patterns.name: Equal SP Equal Percentage Gain/Loss
patterns.template: Two items sold at same price, one at p% gain, one at p% loss

patterns.name: Constant Shift Cipher
patterns.template: Each letter shifted by fixed amount (+1 or -1)
patterns.shortcut: Compare first 2-3 letters to determine shift amount
